title: Arcee, a US open source AI lab, says Chinese models are not inherently dangerous
summary: No, says Lucas Atkins, the CTO of Arcee , which is building open models to give U.S. companies a homegrown alternative to Chinese models. If any startup would benefit from a ban on Chinese models, Arcee would.
